debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℝ
a b : ℝ
hab : a < b
hf : UnifContOn f (Set.Icc a b)
ε : ℝ
hε : 0 < ε
δ : ℝ
hδ₁ : δ > 0
hδ₂ : ∀ x ∈ Set.Icc a b, ∀ y ∈ Set.Icc a b, |y - x| < δ → |f y - f x| < ε / (2 * (b - a))
N : ℕ
hN : 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) < ↑N
n : ℕ
hn : n ≥ N
m : ℕ
hnm : m ≥ n
pos1 : 0 < 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))
NposR : 0 < ↑N
Npos : 0 < N
npos : 0 < n
mpos : 0 < m
⊢ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ

failed_attempts:
have : (n : ℝ) ≥ N := by exact_mod_cast hn
  calc
    2 * (b - a) / n ≤ 2 * (b - a) / N := by gcongr
    _ < 2 * (b - a) / (1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))) := by gcongr; linarith
    _ = δ := by field_simp [hδ₁, hab.ne']

    calc
      (2 * (b - a)) / n = (2 * (b - a)) / ↑n := by norm_cast
      _ < (2 * (b - a)) / (1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))) := by gcongr <;> linarith

  exact this

    _ < 2 * (b - a) / (δ / (2 * (b - a))) := by gcongr <;> linarith

calc
    2 * (b - a) / ↑n = 2 * (b - a) / ↑n := rfl

have : (2 * (b - a)) / n < δ := by
    rw [div_lt_iff (by positivity)]
    have : (2 * (b - a)) < δ * n := by
      calc
        2 * (b - a) = 2 * (b - a) * 1 := by ring
        _ ≤ 2 * (b - a) * (n : ℝ) := by gcongr <;> linarith

          rw [one_div, div_lt_iff (by positivity)] at this
          nlinarith
    linarith

have : (2 * (b - a)) / n < δ := by
    rw [div_lt_iff (by positivity)]
    have : (2 * (b - a)) < δ * n := by
      calc
        2 * (b - a) = 2 * (b - a) * 1 := by ring
        _ < 2 * (b - a) * (n : ℝ) := by gcongr <;> linarith
        _ = δ * n := by

          have : (2 * (b - a)) < δ * N := by
